purpose: First executable ABI/signs bundle slice for the public abyss-machine source seed.

consumer_contract.consumer_expectation: Consumers select a public_source_seed bundle only after durable evidence promotion and a trust-gate allow or warn verdict over registry latest, verification state, digest, source repo, trust root mode, and consumer intent.

consumer_command: abyss-machine artifacts evidence-promote BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --lifecycle-state manually-verified --consumer-ref abyss-machine:public-source-seed --evidence-ref manual-positive:public-source-seed --source-repo abyss-machine --source-ref manifests/artifact_bundles/public_source_seed.bundle.json --producer abyss-machine-public-source-seed --trust-root-mode host_managed --json

abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class public_source_seed --consumer-intent agent --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode host_managed --subject-digest SUBJECT_DIGEST --json
abyss-machine artifacts registry-latest --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class public_source_seed --consumer-intent agent --source-repo abyss-machine --trust-root-mode host_managed --json
